hero.name: Keunho Kim(rootk1m,gnosis)
hero.title: Zero-Day Researcher & Automated Exploit Generation Engineer
hero.subtitle: Evidence-driven security research from vulnerability discovery to automated exploit generation

about.heading: About
about.description_1: Zero-Day Researcher and Automated Exploit Generation Engineer specializing in vulnerability analysis and exploit/reversing across IoT, Embedded, Automotive, and Mobile environments. Beyond finding vulnerabilities, I pursue evidence-based analysis routines that include reproducibility, verification evidence, and documentation deliverables.
about.description_2: Contributed to discovering 18 CVEs through IoT smart doorbell analysis and now focus on automation that reconstructs exploitability from firmware evidence, including SCOUT.
about.description_3: Currently studying Computer Science at Sejong University and completed AI-based security research at CYAI Lab. Experienced as a Red Team intern at AUTOCRYPT Vehicle Threat Research Lab with an AutoHack 2025 award.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.description: Feel free to reach out for security research collaboration, speaking, or opportunities.
